message:
docs: add performance handoff document and update Cargo.lock

STATE_OF_THE_CODEBASE_AND_NEXT_STEPS.md:
- Comprehensive performance analysis handoff document summarizing:
  - Current benchmark matrix results (MVCC vs SQLite across 27 cells)
  - Deep perf profile evidence (95% in write_page, IPC 0.05, 47M
    instructions/op vs 0.79M for SQLite)
  - Diagnosis of two overlapping problems: baseline engine gap (single-
    writer also far behind SQLite) and MVCC structural conflict
    amplification (disjoint inserts converge on shared parent pages)
  - What has been tried and failed (structural preclaim experiments)
  - What has worked (direct-handle fast paths, row-cache improvements)
  - Most promising future avenues: reduce structural mutation frequency,
    optimistic local split plans, disjoint allocator growth, baseline
    engine cost reduction
- Intended as a self-contained handoff for external review.

Cargo.lock: updated for smallvec dependency addition in fsqlite-vdbe.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
